scripts.dev: concurrently -n home,todo,viewer,showcase,flex -c blue,yellow,green,magenta,red "npm -w apps/home run dev" "npm -w apps/todo run dev" "npm -w apps/viewer run dev" "npm -w apps/showcase run dev" "npm -w apps/flex run dev"
scripts.build: npm -w apps/home run build && npm -w apps/todo run build && npm -w apps/viewer run build && npm -w apps/flex run build
scripts.check: npm -w packages/ui run check && npm -w packages/sdk run check
